level_signals: High-agency, self-directed role with full ownership of calendar, relationships, and outcomes
Expected to build scalable programs and repeatable frameworks independently

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Are already embedded in creative and AI creative communities. You know the people, the platforms, the events, and the conversations that matter.
Have hands-on experience with AI creative tooling - you actively use tools like ElevenLabs or similar platforms in your own work and have the portfolio to prove it.
Are comfortable leading a room. You can run a workshop for a brand's marketing team, speak on a panel, or demo live without needing a script.
Are data-fluent. You track what is working, can read community metrics, and use insights to prioritize where to invest time and energy.
Are high agency and self-directed. You will own your calendar, your relationships, and your outcomes.
Are the kind of person who takes an idea all the way through to execution - you don't just identify the opportunity, you build the plan, run it, and make sure it actually lands.
Travel regularly across the US for events, workshops, and community activations (up to 50% of your time).

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have an existing audience or community presence - a following, a newsletter, a YouTube channel, or a reputation in a specific creative niche.
You have experience scaling creator programs and running structured workshops or educational programs.

scope.surface: Creator ecosystem growth for ElevenCreative — voice, music, image, and video creative suite
scope.business_model: B2C and B2B SaaS / AI platform (freemium to enterprise)
primary_metrics_inferred: Creator ICP conversion to long-term users
Community growth metrics and reporting cadence
core_responsibilities: Build scalable community and ambassador programs and repeatable frameworks that grow the creator ecosystem beyond your own direct reach.
Develop lasting relationships with creators, studios, agencies, and community leaders, becoming a trusted presence in those spaces.
Host and lead creator workshops with brands, agencies, marketing teams, and independent creators across ElevenLabs' creative suite - voice, music, image, and video.

Use data and community insights to track growth, identify what is resonating, and scale what works. Establish a regular reporting cadence and feed what you are hearing directly into product and growth teams.

Represent ElevenLabs at IRL creative meetups, AI events, industry conferences, and community gatherings across the US, and plan owned events ranging from intimate creator dinners to larger community meetups.

Help define and evolve the creator ICP as you learn what types of creators get the most value from ElevenLabs tools and convert into long-term users. Represent the voice of the creator community in internal planning, roadmap discussions, and launch strategy.

green_flags: Company is well-funded ($781M raised, $11B valuation) with strong institutional investors (Andreessen Horowitz, Sequoia, ICONIQ)
Remote-first with location flexibility across the US
No job titles policy signals flat, high-trust culture
Annual discretionary L&D stipend and social travel stipend offered
Clear and specific role scope with tangible ownership of creator community programs
Company has visible traction (millions of users, enterprise clients like Meta and Deutsche Telekom)
red_flags: Up to 50% travel requirement is significant and may limit work-life balance
Role requires being 'already embedded' in AI creative communities — hard to break in for outsiders
No job titles policy may create ambiguity around career progression and leveling
